features.name: unpacked array with multi-dimensional indexing in always_comb
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array declaration where the array is indexed using a for loop variable inside an always_comb block

features.name: for loop with int vs genvar in always_comb
features.description: Code should include a for loop using int variable inside always_comb that operates on an unpacked array, where genvar in generate would work instead
